global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear promotional message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for the DriftPass service.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A smooth, solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'DriftPass' in bold, modern typography, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are lightly outlined in the center.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Special fares today' is presented in a clear, bold font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€29.99' is displayed in a large, eye-catching font at the bottom, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font, inviting users to take action, located below the price.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, DriftPass, special fares, €29.99, Get offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by geometric shapes, the headline in the center, the price at the bottom, and the CTA button below the price.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter Special fares today, €29.99 Get offer, DriftPass
